resources.string: Do you want to delete the note?
If you find Notefy useful, share it with your friends

Hi there, I\'ve found a super cool Notes app that can make your life easier. You can create Colorful notes with Text and Photos, Share notes, set Reminders, create a Todo list, and much more. Experience the app from the play store:\nhttps://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.imangi.templerun
How to create a New Note?
What can be added in the Note?
How to Create a Todo list?
Where can I Find deleted Notes?
How can I change the Display view?
How can I Sort my Notes?
How can I change the App Theme?
How can I change the App Language?
How can I make Notes Colorful?

You can use Notefy to take Notes, set Reminders, that you want to notified. Add Todo list, Colors, Images, URLs and Places to your notes. Choose language that you are comfortable. You can share your notes with friends, also you can change theme of the app, secure your app by enabling Screen Lock and much more.

You can create a new note in two ways:
1. Click on the + button at the bottom-right side of the Home screen. Or
2. Click on the Menu icon of the top action bar, and now click on the New Note tab.
A new window will open to create a new note.

You can add the following features in the Note:
1. Note Title
2. Note Description
3. Reminder
4. Place
5. URL
6. Colored background
7. Image
8. Todo list
9. You can also bookmark the note

Click on the Add box icon at the bottom side of the New note screen, and select Reminder. A Calendar will pop up, choose the date you want to set the reminder and click on OK. Now a Clock will pop up, choose the time and click on OK. Now you have successfully set the reminder. A confirmation message will also display. Now based on the date and time you\'ve chosen a Notification with note title, description and Image will be notified.

Click on the Checklist icon at the bottom side of the New note screen. Todo Checklist popup will occur. You can add, delete, and update any number of to-do items with tick boxes, once completed click on the Done button.

You can delete notes in the following ways:
1. To delete a single note, you can simply swipe it to the left or right side of the home screen.
2. To delete multiple notes at the same time, long press on any note and select the notes you want to delete or click on select all in the action bar, then click on the Delete icon.
3. Open the note you want to delete, then click on the delete icon at the top action bar.
Note: You can UNDO the notes right after you delete them.
Once you delete the notes, they will be added to Recycle bin. And from there either you can restore them or delete them forever. You can find Recycle bin in the Navigation drawer.

You can update your profile photo, name, email, and phone in the profile page. You can open your profile by\n1. Click on the profile photo on the home screen at the top-right corner. Or\n2. Click on the Profile tab from the navigation drawer.
To change the view, you can switch between grid view and linear view by clicking on the grid button right side of the Search view on the Home screen.

Once you add notes, you can display them in any of the following order:
1. Bookmarked
2. Title by Asc order
3. Title by Desc order
4. Newest to oldest
5. Oldest to newest
To do so click on the Sort by an icon on the top action bar of the home screen. The default order is Newest to oldest.
To share your notes with friends, you can open the note that you want to share, and click on the Share button on the top-right action bar. You can choose any medium to share it.
Open the navigation drawer from the left side, toggle the Dark theme switch to enable Dark mode, and disable the switch for light mode.

Currently, Notefy supports 15 different languages. English is the default language, you can change any language of your choice. Open the language screen from the left-side navigation drawer and select any language. Click on continue.
You can change the notes\' background color of your choice. Click on the color icon in the new note screen. You can choose either from default colors or from the color picker.

To Secure your app, you can enable the Screen Lock feature from the left side navigation drawer, it will accept your phone password or biometric or pattern. You can enable or disable based on your need.
Add a new note to appear here
Notes you delete will appear here
Do you want to restore the note?

Notefy is used to take Notes, add Reminders, create a Todo list, and much more. You can save your notes with Images, Colors, Places, and URLs.

 You can filter notes based on your Preferences, Search and Share your notes. It supports a Dark theme and a Light theme. For Security, it has a Screen Lock feature.

 You can choose your preferred Language, currently, Notefy supports 15 different languages. For any help, you can either read the FAQs or Contact us.
